BOU.name: Bournemouth
BOU.note: Manager change: Iraola → Marco Rose. Tactical reset · apply 0.8× discount until pre-season friendlies confirm system.

CHE.name: Chelsea
CHE.note: Manager change: Maresca → Xabi Alonso. New possession-system. 9 WC reps confirmed via FIFA squad numbering (R.James, P.Neto, Hato, Cucurella, Enzo F., Gusto, Lavia, Caicedo, M.Sarr). Prior 'Caicedo omitted' mispricing call is REVERSED — he IS in ECU squad #23. CHE-owned loanees (Páez, Penders, Jackson) not counted for PL fatigue. CHE is now sole 3rd-heaviest WC load behind ARS (16) and MCI (14). Apply 0.8× discount.

HUL.name: Hull City (Promoted)
HUL.note: Note: Heavy rotation tax — Jakirovic rotated Hughes, Giles, Slater between matches in Championship. Avoid as starters in opening 26/27 squad.

LIV.name: Liverpool
LIV.note: MAJOR REGIME CHANGE: Slot departed despite winning 25/26 PL title (Arsenal won, not LIV). Andoni Iraola (just left BOU at end of 25/26) is the strong rumor. Iraola's profile = high-press · vertical · transition football — fits Kerkez attacking-WB role, Isak's mobility, Wirtz as #10 in transition. But: Iraola has never managed at top-6 level. Combined with 7 WC reps (Wirtz/Alisson/van Dijk/Gravenberch/Gakpo/Mac Allister/Isak — Konaté CONFIRMED LEAVING May 30) + 4+ gold-pick departures (TAA, Salah-rumor, Robbo, Konaté) = HIGH-VARIANCE. Apply 0.8× until system + first-XI confirmed in pre-season friendlies.

MCI.name: Man City
MCI.manager: Maresca strong option (Pep gone) · Multiple departures
MCI.note: Major rebuild: Pep + Bernardo + KDB + Walker + Grealish + Stones (CONFIRMED leaving · destination TBD) all gone. 15 WC reps (2nd heaviest behind ARS at 16) + manager change + Semenyo arrival from BOU + Stones departure. Apply 0.8× discount. Haaland's auto-default captain status broken. Doku (BEL OMITTED) is the lone rested premium.

MUN.name: Man Utd
MUN.note: RB hierarchy under Carrick: Dalot > Mazraoui — Dalot logged more RB minutes in 25/26. For 26/27 FPL: Dalot (POR) is the MUN RB pick despite same 0.85× WC discount as Mazraoui (MAR).

NEW.name: Newcastle
NEW.note: Heavy squad churn for 26/27: 7 confirmed outgoings (Gordon → Barcelona, Krafth + Trippier + Targett + Ruddy + Thompson released, Ramsdale loan-return to Southampton). GK department wide open → Pope likely nailed #1 again or external signing. + 6 WC reps (Livramento, Burn, Thiaw, Woltemade, Bruno G., Elanga). Apply 0.85× until incomings clarify.

TOT.name: Tottenham
TOT.manager: Roberto De Zerbi (3-4 games in) · IF SURVIVES
TOT.note: Multiple loan-status TBC for 26/27: Palhinha (Bayern, Sporting linked), Tel (Bayern?), Kolo Muani (PSG?). Cross-reference at late-June squad reveal.

WHU.name: West Ham 🔻
WHU.note: 26/27 status: West Ham confirmed relegated end of 25/26 season. Players with PL clauses (Bowen most likely, plus Castellanos, Summerville, Kilman, Walker-Peters) will be aggressively pursued by other PL clubs. The IN/OUT records below were the 25/26 transfer history; the 26/27 squad shape will not exist as a PL roster. WHU drops off the FPL toolkit's WC-load cross-reference (was tagged "zero WC load" — now irrelevant for PL planning).
